title: ASUS ROG Azoth X Wireless Mechanical Gaming Keyboard – 75% TKL, Tri-Mode Connectivity, Hot Swappable Pre-lubed ROG NX V2 Snow Linear Switches, South-Facing PCB, PBT Keycaps, PC/Mac Support - White

bullets: Tri-mode connectvity: Seamlessly connect to three devices via Bluetooth. Experience ultra-low latency gameplay with ROG SpeedNova wireless technology in 2.4 GHz RF mode (1600+ hours battery life with OLED & RGB off), or utilize a standard wired USB connection.

Deep, Crisp Typing Sounds & Comfortable Feel: Enjoy sublime acoustics thanks to the gasket mount and five-layer dampening design. A silicone layer and four PORON layers absorb vibrations and switch ping, while the FR4 positioning plate provides a more flexible typing feel and low-pitched, crisp sound.

Hot Swappable, Pre-Lubricated Mechanical Switches: Choose between upgraded ROG NX V2 Snow linear switches (buttery smooth and thocky) or ROG NX V2 Storm clicky switches (crisp, tactile feedback). Durable PBT doubleshot keycaps provide a premium feel.

Premium Aesthetics & Customization: The south-facing PCB maximizes keycap compatibility, allowing for personalized setups and advanced lighting effects. Stellar-themed ROG keycaps enhance the RGB lighting with a semi-translucent design. Further personalize your custom gaming keyboard style with the hot-swappable keycaps.

OLED Display & Intuitive Controls: Monitor CPU/GPU stats, media playback, custom animations, PC/Mac mode indicators, and other keyboard settings in real-time on the integrated 2-inch OLED screen. A multi-function control knob provides tactile adjustment for volume, lighting, and more, offering unparalleled command.

script.title: Unlock Your Gaming Potential with This Keyboard!
script.narration: POV: You just found the missing piece for your gaming setup. The ASUS ROG Azoth X combines buttery smooth typing with ultra-low latency, letting you switch between devices seamlessly. Elevate your game with stunning RGB and custom keycaps. Link is in the first comment!

bullets: Powerful Starts, Every Time: Start your vehicle with confidence using this high-performance battery jumper starter portable. With a peak current of 2000A, it provides the instant boost needed to start 12V vehicles with engines up to 8.0L gasoline or 6.0L diesel—even in extreme temperatures ranging from -4°F to 140°F. Whether you're driving a car, SUV, pick-up truck, motorcycle, or lawnmower, this jump box for car battery delivers reliable, on-demand power when you need it most

Ultra-Long-Lasting Power: This jump starter features a high-density, military-grade lithium battery with a total capacity of 2600 mAh ×4 (4S), providing a stable and powerful output. Even on chilly mornings, this jump starter provides reliable energy to get your vehicle going quickly. Its intelligent sleep mode and ultra-low standby power consumption help retain more energy between uses, reducing the need for frequent charging

Safer and More Reliable: Our jump starter with air compressor features a high-efficiency Battery Management System (BMS) that monitors, controls, and optimizes the battery pack in real time. The car jump starter helps protect and extend battery life while delivering safety performance up to three times greater than standard starters. With 10 key protections—such as short circuit, overcurrent, and overheating protection—it ensures your car starts smoothly and safely without risk of damage

More Durable: This battery jump starter box is built with aerospace-grade, high-strength composite materials, and its internal precision circuit board is secured using suspension anti-vibration technology—providing excellent resistance to impact and drops. Even if accidentally dropped from a height (such as the hood), it effectively absorbs shock and protects core components. Tested through thousands of lab drop tests, this jump box for car battery remains strong and reliable

Strong Air Compressor: This car battery charger features a high-performance air compressor with an upgraded pump system and powerful motor, delivering airflow up to 35L/min for noticeably faster inflation than traditional units. It inflates standard tires quickly, helping drivers get back on the road sooner. The dual heat-dissipation design with an internal cooling fan keeps temperatures lower, supporting faster cooling, longer lifespan, and better tire protection during continuous use
